title: Public editor-container contracts and manifest shape
evidence: packages/platform-api/src/index.ts defines framework-neutral EditorContainer* contracts and editor.containers capability
packages/plugin-api/src/index.ts defines containerEntry and contributes.editorContainers manifest contracts
Review blocker fix changed shouldActivate to synchronous boolean-only activation

title: Plugin-host validation and trusted-core resolution
evidence: packages/plugin-host/src/index.ts validates editorContainers, rejects community trusted containers, enforces editor.containers/editor.read, and resolves trusted contributions
plugins/core/slash-menu/plugin.json declares the core slash menu contribution

title: Desktop bridge and renderer delivery
evidence: apps/desktop/src/main/runtime.ts resolves trusted editor containers
apps/desktop/src/index.ts, main/index.ts, and preload/index.ts expose explicit resolveEditorContainers bridge wiring
apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/App.vue loads resolved editor containers and passes them to MarkdownEditor
tests/desktop-editor-container-bridge-wiring.test.ts and tests/desktop-file-tree-toolbar.test.ts cover bridge/prop delivery

title: Private editor adapter and cursor-popover host semantics
evidence: packages/editor/src/editor-container-adapter.ts adapts public containers to private editor-window contributions
packages/editor/src/editor-window-contributions.ts keeps raw cursor coordinates internal and anchors cursor-popover groups from coordsAtPos(mainCursor)
packages/editor/src/index.ts no longer exports private editor-window host primitives from the @zorid/editor root
tests/editor-window-contributions.test.ts covers adapter lifecycle, sync activation contract, cursor anchor positioning, and close suppression

title: Slash-menu dogfood and plugin-ui support
evidence: plugins/core/slash-menu/src/index.ts registers slashMenuEditorContainer through ctx.register.editorContainer
plugins/core/slash-menu/src/editor-containers.ts implements a minimal slash-menu cursor-popover
packages/plugin-ui/src/index.ts includes editor-container UI mount helpers
apps/desktop/src/renderer/src/editor-container-key-routing.ts routes captured editor keydown events to active editor-container roots
Final high review fix attaches slash-menu keydown handling to ctx.root so routed host events reach the menu behavior

title: Verification and review blocker cleanup
evidence: Initial ADR0005 quality:fast passed before independent review blockers
Review blockers addressed: explicit bridge delivery, sync activation type, cursor-popover anchor, and current ultragoal artifacts
